title: Continuous Internal Evaluation (CIE) Workflow
description: A flowchart illustrating the cyclical process of Continuous Internal Evaluation in a data analytics context using R, showing how assessment, analysis, and feedback create an iterative learning loop.
relationships: Assessment design leads to data collection
Data collection feeds into automated evaluation
Evaluation results are analyzed for performance insights
Analysis generates automated feedback for students
Feedback and analysis inform curriculum adjustment
Curriculum adjustment leads to new assessment design
